title: Viral inhibitors, the synthesis thereof, and intermediates thereto
abstract: The present disclosure discloses compositions comprising maribavir, methods of providing the same, and compositions providing intermediates useful in providing maribavir. Maribavir (((2S,3S,4R,5S)-2-(5,6-dichloro-2-(isopropylamino)-1H-benzo[d]imidazol-1-yl)-5-(hydroxymethyl)tetrahydrofuran-3,4-diol) is a benzimidazole riboside and is an orally available antiviral medication against cytomegalovirus (CMV).
